# CloverSec CTF For Example 1.0.11

This release fixes issues found in natural-prompt full-flow tests.

- Final archive stage now refuses cases that only have platform pages, writeups, solver repositories, or search leads. These are marked as missing materials instead of becoming final delivery packages.
- Archive completion now checks `archive_manifest.json` issues and file count. A manifest with unresolved issues no longer marks the archive stage as completed.
- Container challenge attachments are copied into `题目附件` instead of being mixed into `题目源码`.
- `workflow init` accepts `--workdir` as an alias of `--out`, matching the common command users tried in tests.
- Docker validation accepts common operation aliases such as `probe_http`, `probe_tcp`, `inspect_image`, and `save_image_tar`. Unknown explicit operations now produce an issue instead of silently running the default full operation set.
- Container inference now reads `docker-compose.yml` nested `build.context` and uses it as the Dockerizer source directory.

Validation:

- `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test_*.py'`
- `python3 /Users/d1a0y1bb/.codex/skills/.system/plugin-creator/scripts/validate_plugin.py plugins/cloversec-ctf-forexample`
